hypotheses.name: GC-TF vs Plasma-TF centroid proximity divergence across layers
hypotheses.method: For GC-TFs (BATF, SPIB, BACH2; n=3) and plasma-TFs (IRF4, PRDM1; n=2): compute mean distance to B-cell identity centroid at each layer L0-L11. z-score vs null (all 195 genes). Spearman trend on z-scores.
hypotheses.result_value: +0.55 (L11 plasma z), GC z=-1.52 (L11), GC-plasma separation rho=-0.643 p=0.024
hypotheses.next_action: Cross-validate: measure plasma-TF z trajectory with a larger plasma marker set if more in-vocab. Consider Geneformer comparison of GC/plasma proximity patterns.

hypotheses.name: B-cell centroid directional drift alignment with differentiation axis
hypotheses.method: Track B-cell centroid (n=5 in-vocab) displacement from L0 at each layer. Measure cosine similarity of drift with B->plasma direction vector (L11). Also compute GC-plasma centroid angle from B-cell perspective per layer. Spearman trends.
hypotheses.result_value: rho=-0.531, p=0.075; angle GC-plasma from BC: 77deg(L0) to 94deg(L11); drift_mag rho=0.993 p<0.0001
hypotheses.next_action: GC-plasma angle becoming orthogonal (94deg at L11) is novel — quantify in cross-model Geneformer. Drift magnitude is huge but directionless relative to plasma. Investigate what direction B-cell drifts toward.

hypotheses.name: Master B-cell TF proximity + NK/myeloid specificity screen
hypotheses.method: Part A: PAX5/EBF1/BCL6 distance to B-cell centroid at L2 (blocked - not in vocab). Part B: NK precision@10 (blocked - only PRF1 in vocab). Part C: Myeloid precision@10 (blocked - 0 in vocab). GC-TF reference values confirmed.
hypotheses.result_value: blocked: PAX5/EBF1/BCL6/myeloid/NK not in vocab; GC-TF reference confirmed: BATF 96th pctile, SPIB 94th, BACH2 86th
hypotheses.next_action: Use extended vocabulary (cycle2_maxgenes1024) which may include PAX5/EBF1/BCL6. This is required for specificity validation.
